Python Lists.question: What is a Python list ?
Python Lists.expected_answer: A Python list is an ordered mutable collection of items.

history.user_answer: A list stores multiple items in order and can be modified.

history.feedback: You're on the right track! A Python list is indeed a collection of data. To make your definition more complete, remember that lists are also 'ordered' and 'mutable'. Keep up the great work!

Python Dictionary.question: What is a Python dictionary?
Python Dictionary.expected_answer: A Python dictionary stores key-value pairs and allows lookup by key.

Python Sets.question: What is a Python set?
Python Sets.expected_answer: A Python set is an unordered collection of unique elements.

history.feedback: You're right that a Python set is a collection of unique items! To make your answer even more precise, remember that sets are also unordered.
